css_strategy: Tailwind CSS v4 with @theme tokens. Base styles target mobile. Breakpoints add complexity upward.

sm.usage: Large phones in landscape, minor layout adjustments

md.usage: Tablet portrait. Sidebar collapse point. Bottom nav -> rail transition. 2-column grids begin.

lg.usage: Tablet landscape / small desktop. Full sidebar expands. 3-column grids. Split panes activate.

xl.usage: Standard desktop. Maximum content width applied. Optimal reading experience.

2xl.usage: Large desktop. Extra whitespace, wider card grids, comfortable spacing.

custom.sidebar_collapse: 768px (md) — below this: bottom nav. At and above: sidebar rail.
custom.sidebar_expand: 1024px (lg) — at and above: rail + contextual panel (264px total).
custom.editor_split_pane: 1024px (lg) — below: stacked. At and above: side-by-side.

secondary_nav.trigger: Drill-down from bottom nav items (e.g., experiment categories)

command_palette.trigger: Search icon in top header bar (no keyboard shortcut prominent on mobile)
command_palette.layout: Full-width, positioned at top of viewport

header.content: Page title (left) + search icon + theme toggle (right)

primary_nav.items: 5 icon-only nav items + theme toggle at bottom

secondary_nav.trigger: Click on rail icon opens 200px panel overlay (not push)

command_palette.trigger: CMD+K / Ctrl+K + search icon in header

primary_nav.panel_behavior: Persistent, shows contextual sub-navigation per section
primary_nav.collapse_toggle: Button at bottom of panel to collapse to rail-only

stat_strip.desktop: 4-col single row, larger cards with sparkline charts

recent_experiments.desktop: 3-col bento asymmetric grid: 1 featured (span-2 rows) + 4 standard

agent_status.mobile: Horizontal scroll row of 3 agent cards (snap-x)
agent_status.desktop: 3-col grid within right sidebar area or inline row

activity_feed.desktop: Right column (300px fixed) or bottom section, scrollable

search_filters.mobile: Sticky search bar + horizontal scroll category chips below
search_filters.desktop: Full search bar + category chips + sort/view toggles, single row

view_toggle.list_view_mobile: Compact horizontal card (image left, text right)
view_toggle.list_view_desktop: Table-like rows with columns: thumbnail, name, category, status, date

tablet.layout: Single column with wider content area

mobile.edit_trigger: FAB button (bottom-right, 56px, primary color) opens editor
mobile.note_list: Accessed via back navigation or drawer
mobile.toolbar: Fixed bottom toolbar above keyboard when editing

tablet.layout: Note list sidebar (240px collapsible) + editor/viewer area
tablet.sidebar_trigger: Toggle button or swipe-right from edge

desktop.grid_template: grid-cols-[260px_1fr] or grid-cols-[260px_1fr_1fr] when preview visible

sidebar.list: Scrollable note list with date groups

editor.toolbar: Floating inline on text selection (Tiptap BubbleMenu)

mobile.preview: Tap card opens full-screen preview with bottom sheet for details
mobile.cta: Sticky bottom bar with primary CTA

tablet.theme_selector: Horizontal row of 4 theme cards (visual swatches)
tablet.preview: Tap card opens overlay panel (right side, 50% width)

gallery.grid: grid-cols-2 within left area (or grid-cols-3 at 2xl)
gallery.cards: Thumbnail + title + category badge + theme indicator

theme_selector.type: 4 visual swatch cards in horizontal row

presentation_mode.trigger: Button in header or P key
presentation_mode.layout: Full-screen, no chrome, arrow key navigation between experiments

settings.desktop: Left nav (200px) + right content (1fr), max-width 800px centered

typography_scaling.strategy: Fluid typography using clamp() for key heading levels. Body text remains fixed for readability.

touch_targets.note: WCAG 2.5.8 Target Size (Minimum) requires 24x24px. We exceed this at 48x48px for comfort.
applies_to: Sidebar rail icons (48x48px hit area within 64px rail)
Checkbox/Radio (24px visual + 48px hit area via padding)
touch_targets.spacing_between_targets: Minimum 8px gap between adjacent interactive elements on mobile

tables.mobile: Horizontal scroll with sticky first column. Shadow gradient on scroll edge to indicate overflow.
tables.tablet: Full table if columns <= 5. Otherwise horizontal scroll.
tables.implementation: Wrapper div with overflow-x-auto. First column position: sticky; left: 0; z-index: 1.

code_blocks.mobile: Full-width, overflow-x: auto with horizontal scroll. Font size reduced to 12px. Line numbers hidden.
code_blocks.tablet: Overflow-x: auto. Font size 13px. Line numbers visible.
code_blocks.desktop: Full display within split pane or content area. Font size 13px. Line numbers visible.
code_blocks.copy_button: Sticky top-right corner of code block

editor_toolbar.mobile: Fixed bottom strip above keyboard. Icons only, no labels. 6 core actions.
editor_toolbar.tablet: Floating bubble menu on text selection. Icons + short labels.
editor_toolbar.desktop: Floating bubble menu on text selection. Full labels.

images.strategy: Next.js Image component with sizes attribute per component context
images.loading: lazy for below-fold, eager for LCP candidates (first card, hero)
images.placeholder: blur (generated at build time via next/image blurDataURL)

long_text.mobile: Line-clamp-3 on card descriptions, expandable on tap
long_text.desktop: Line-clamp-2 on cards (wider cards need less lines), full text in detail views

image_strategy.optimization: Next.js Image component handles format negotiation and resizing automatically

orientations: Landscape (tablets only — phone landscape is supported but not optimized)
zoom_levels: 400% (WCAG 1.4.10 Reflow — content must not require 2D scroll at 320px equivalent)
accessibility_responsive: Screen reader with mobile VoiceOver (iOS Safari)
Reduced motion preference enabled — verify all animations respect it
High contrast mode (Windows) — verify borders and focus indicators visible
Text spacing override (WCAG 1.4.12) — verify no content clipping
automated_tools: Storybook viewport addon for component-level responsive testing
